protein: gp17 (T4 large terminase / large subunit of the terminase)
family: ASCE dsDNA-packaging ATPase (viral large terminase); same functional family as phi29 gp16

assembled_ring.method: cryo-EM pseudo-atomic (crystal fit into 34 A map)
assembled_ring.title: Bacteriophage T4 gp17 motor assembly based on crystal structures and cryo-EM reconstructions
assembled_ring.state: relaxed / assembled motor (no DNA modeled); channel axis = 5-fold symmetry axis

oligomeric_state: pentamer (5 gp17 on the dodecameric gp20 portal)

functional_residues.note_finger: Rao lab named 4 candidate arg-fingers (R162/R245/R321/R406). R321,R406 lie OUTSIDE the ATPase domain (portal-binding / nuclease). Within the ATPase ring: R162 is Walker-A-proximal (sits at 161-167) -> reads CIS; R245 reaches ACROSS the subunit interface to the neighbour's catalytic carboxylate E256 -> the de-facto TRANS arginine finger (measured 3.7-4.0 A to neighbour E256 in the independent native-ring fold, 5/5).
functional_residues.provenance: UniProt P17312 features (Walker A 161-167, Walker B 251-256, active site E256, ATP binding 138/143/202, coupling 285-287) + 2O0H ATP contacts (Walker-A G165/K166/T167/T168, R202) + Rao-lab literature (E256 catalytic carboxylate PMID 12875841; arg-finger candidates). Not guessed.

topology_3ezk.channel_axis: 5-fold symmetry axis (normal to plane of chain centroids); no DNA modeled
topology_3ezk.caveat: 3EZK is a CA-only 34 A pseudo-atomic model; distances are low-precision (report ~ +/- several A).

topology_verdict.termini_vs_channel: ATPase C-terminus (res360) is OFF the channel (32.8 A) - unlike gp16 whose C-term jams the DNA channel (6.2 A). N-terminus (res10) sits near the channel wall (13.3 A).
topology_verdict.direct_CtoN_gap: 34 A for the ATPase-domain ring (between ClpX ~20 A and Rho ~41 A).
topology_verdict.predicted_optimal_topology: direct C->N fusion (C-term off-channel => a genetic fusion does not foul the DNA channel; 34 A gap bridgeable by a linker; predicted borderline due to gap length).
topology_verdict.tested_result: direct fusion (ATPase domain x5, 20-aa GS linker, tiled MSA) CLOSES: M1 sequential_consistent YES, compact planar ring (radius 32.7 A, radius_CV 0.01, planarity 0.2 A), trans arg-finger R245 -> neighbour active site 5/5 (R245->neighbour E256 4.5-5.2 A). Reproduces the independent native-ring geometry (native R245->nbr E256 3.7-4.0 A, radius 32.0 A). Single-seq control of the same construct: R245-trans 0/5, planarity 6.8 A (confounded).
topology_verdict.topology_row: gp17 (pentamer): termini peripheral-ish (ATPase C-term 32.8 A OFF-channel), direct C->N gap 34 A -> DIRECT FUSION (tested: closes, R245 trans-finger 5/5).
